case_title: ARF FINANCIAL, LLC VS. DAVID KITTREDGE, INDIVIDUALLY, ET AL

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF ARF FINANCIAL, LLC

APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARF FINANCIAL, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT KITTREDGE, INDIVIDUALLY,, DAVID AND THE MARITAL COMMUNITY COMPOSED OF DAVID KITTREDGE AND JANE DOE KITTREDGE, HUSBAND AND WIFE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ARF FINANCIAL, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KITTREDGE, INDIVIDUALLY,, DAVID AND THE MARITAL COMMUNITY COMPOSED OF DAVID KITTREDGE AND JANE DOE KITTREDGE, HUSBAND AND WIFE $18,072.73 PRINCIPAL, $370.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $18,442.73, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS (TRANSACTION ID # 100019416) FILED BY ATTORNEY HEALY, BRIAN S.

ORIGINAL NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT AND PROOF OF SERVICE ON APPLICATION AND NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100020970) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARF FINANCIAL, LLC SERVED JUL-01-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE JUL-03-2017 AS TO DEFENDANT KITTREDGE, INDIVIDUALLY,, DAVID PROCESS COMPLETED BY DEFAULT SECTION. WRIT MAY ISSUE ON AUG-11-2017 IF NO MOTION FILED BY DEFENDANT
